name: Score content virality with AI before publishing and notify team via Slack

parameters.content:
## Score content virality with AI before publishing and notify team via Slack

This workflow scores content (0–100) for virality potential before publishing, using historical performance patterns, real-time trend signals, and AI analysis.

### Who's it for
• Social media managers publishing 5+ pieces/week
• Content marketing teams wanting data-driven decisions
• Creators optimizing for reach and engagement

### How it works
1. Accepts new content via webhook or manual trigger
2. Validates the content input
3. Fetches historical post performance data
4. Retrieves current trending topics & audience signals
5. AI analyses trend alignment & predicts engagement
6. Calculates a weighted virality score (0–100)
7. Routes content based on score tier
8. Sends recommendations and logs to Google Sheets

### Score Tiers
• 75–100 → 🟢 HIGH VIRALITY — Publish immediately
• 40–74  → 🟡 MODERATE — Optional tweaks suggested
• 0–39   → 🔴 LOW — Revision recommendations sent

### Requirements
• Webhook or schedule trigger
• Google Sheets (historical data + log)
• OpenAI / Anthropic API key
• Trends data source (e.g., SerpAPI, Exploding Topics)
• Notification service (Slack / SendGrid / Email)

### Setup Steps
1. Import this workflow
2. Configure credentials for OpenAI, Google Sheets, and your trends API
3. Populate your Google Sheet with past post performance data
4. Set your platform, niche, and audience profile in the 'Config' node
5. Activate

nodes.name: Webhook - Content Submitted
nodes.notes: Receives new content payload. Expected fields: title, body, platform, content_type, target_audience, proposed_publish_time, media_urls (optional).

nodes.name: Schedule - Daily Content Queue
nodes.notes: Alternative trigger: polls a content queue spreadsheet every weekday at 9am.

nodes.name: Normalize Content Input
nodes.notes: Standardizes fields from both the webhook and schedule trigger into a single schema.

nodes.name: Python - Validate Content Input
nodes.notes: Validates required fields, checks minimum content length, detects empty/null inputs. Sets is_valid flag and validation_errors list.

nodes.name: Filter - Valid Content Only
nodes.notes: Drops invalid submissions. Invalid items can be routed to an error notification branch.

nodes.name: Load Platform Config
nodes.notes: Loads platform-specific benchmarks and scoring weight configuration. Customize weights here to match your niche.

nodes.name: Fetch Historical Performance Data
nodes.notes: Fetches past post data from Google Sheets. Columns: date, title, platform, content_type, views, likes, shares, comments, saves, engagement_rate. Replace YOUR_SHEET_ID and YOUR_API_KEY.

nodes.name: Fetch Trending Topics & Signals
nodes.notes: Calls SerpAPI Google Trends to get current trend index for the content topic. Replace YOUR_SERPAPI_KEY. Alternative: use Exploding Topics API or Brandwatch.

nodes.name: Fetch Audience Behavior Signals
nodes.notes: Fetches last 7 days of audience activity: peak active hours, top content formats, sentiment index, avg session time. Replace with your analytics platform (GA4, Sprout Social, Hootsuite Insights, etc.).

nodes.name: Python - Merge & Normalize Signals
nodes.notes: Merges historical data, trends, and audience signals into a unified context object. Handles missing data gracefully by substituting safe defaults.

nodes.name: Wait - Rate Limit Buffer
nodes.notes: 1-second pause to respect API rate limits before the AI analysis call.

nodes.name: AI - Virality Score & Analysis
nodes.notes: Core AI node. Sends all collected signals to the LLM and returns a structured virality prediction JSON.

nodes.name: OpenAI Chat Model
nodes.notes: Using GPT-4.1-mini for cost efficiency. Swap to gpt-4o for highest accuracy.

nodes.name: JS - Parse & Enrich Score
nodes.notes: Parses AI JSON response safely. Applies fallback defaults if parsing fails. Enforces score_tier boundaries.

nodes.name: Slack - Notify High Virality
nodes.notes: Sends an urgent Slack alert for high-virality content. Replace YOUR_SLACK_WEBHOOK_PATH.

nodes.name: Slack - Notify Moderate Virality
nodes.notes: Sends a moderate-priority Slack notice with optional improvement tips.

nodes.name: Email - Low Virality Revision Alert
nodes.notes: Sends a detailed revision email for low-virality content. Update recipient email and SendGrid API credentials.

nodes.name: Log to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Appends full scoring record to VirailtyLog tab for continuous pattern refinement. Replace YOUR_SHEET_ID. Columns: timestamp, submission_id, title, platform, content_type, score, tier, component_scores x5, key_drivers, weaknesses, recommendations, best_publish_time, engagement_low, engagement_high, confidence.

nodes.name: Webhook Response - Return Score
nodes.notes: Returns the full virality prediction payload to the caller when triggered via webhook.
